item.title: Version 0.24.1.0
item.description: Maintenance release with minor improvements.

item.title: Version 0.24.0.0
item.description:
﻿## Features
- adds a crash handler and crash logging
- logs now show a clear version number
- shows 4 part version number in the about dialog

item.title: Version 0.23.1.0
item.description:
﻿## Bug Fixes
- remove demos from firmware
- missing change
- 4 part installer

item.title: Version 0.23.0
item.description:
﻿## Features
- this is a test pre release change

## Bug Fixes
- ci
- versioning
- versioning
- read 4 part release number
- ci
- change publishing

item.title: Version 0.22.0
item.description:
﻿## Features
- adds pre releases to studio

item.title: Version 0.21.3
item.description: ﻿Maintenance release with minor improvements.

item.title: Version 0.21.2
item.description: ﻿Maintenance release with minor improvements.

item.title: Version 0.21.1
item.description:
﻿## Bug Fixes
- fake fix to test release system

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.29
item.description:
## Features
- add custom sensor definition dialog (table / beta / Steinhart-Hart) (#121)
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.28
item.description:
## Features
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.27
item.description:
## Features
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.26
item.description:
## Features
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.25
item.description:
## Features
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.24
item.description:
## Features
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix
